feed.title: Text & Talk...
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Text & Talk... (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Mothering in a digital age – a first-time mother’s account of using an infant tracking application
entry.summary: Authors: Philippa Amery, Susan Danby, Maryanne Theobald DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2025-0031 Pages: Page range: 429-449

entry.title: Modality in Chilean Spanish: construing historical interpretations in the Introduction to the Report of the Commission of Historical Truth
entry.summary: Authors: Claudia Castro, Teresa Oteíza, Felipe Lledó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2025-0003 Pages: Page range: 451-476

entry.title: “No Gain? No Pain!”: metapragmatic comments and their role in online fandom construction on social media
entry.summary: Authors: Jialiang Chen, Ping Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0262 Pages: Page range: 477-498

entry.title: The language of scientific uncertainty in Congressional hearings
entry.summary: Authors: Denise Coberley DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0245 Pages: Page range: 499-519

entry.title: Cutting emissions, halting biodiversity loss: climate change solutions in the language of UK politicians and UK climate activists, 2018–2020
entry.summary: Authors: John S. G. Currie DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0231 Pages: Page range: 521-545

entry.title: Hermeneutic injustice and troubling experiences of interactional inequality: a review
entry.summary: Authors: Melisa Stevanovic, Minna Leinonen, Henri Nevalainen, Annika Valtonen, Elina Weiste DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0286 Pages: Page range: 547-567
